data.title: build-review-agents.sh: worktree invocation -> agent files written to main repo instead of worktree
data.description:
## Incident Overview
build-review-agents.sh resolves DSO_PLUGIN_DIR from _PLUGIN_ROOT which follows the symlinked plugin cache path, not the current worktree. When invoked without explicit --output and --deltas flags in a worktree, regenerated agent files are silently written to the main repo's plugins/dso/agents/ instead of the worktree's copy.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. In a worktree, edit plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-test-quality.md
2. Run: bash plugins/dso/scripts/build-review-agents.sh
3. Check: grep for your change in plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-test-quality.md — it won't be there
4. Check: the main repo's copy was updated instead

## Expected Behavior
build-review-agents.sh should resolve paths relative to the current git worktree (git rev-parse --show-toplevel), not from _PLUGIN_ROOT.

## Workaround
Pass explicit paths: --deltas "$REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts" --output "$REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso/agents"
